acceptedRisks.title: ip SSRF improper categorization in isPublic
acceptedRisks.reason: webtorrent@3.0.6 is the latest upstream release and still depends on bittorrent-tracker -> ip@2.0.1. The vulnerable package is pulled in by bittorrent-tracker's tracker server UDP parser; sTorent embeds WebTorrent as a client and does not expose a tracker server. Replacing the engine is larger than the stage-3 file/category/tag scope, so the MVP accepts this transitive risk explicitly until an upstream fix or engine migration is ready.
